prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为约22835名→23018名→23581名→21226名→27375名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年曾短暂前移至21226名，但2025年大幅后 移6149名至27375名，为近五年最低水平，显示报考热度明显降温；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2025年及2026年均为6人，连续六年保持不变 ，计划层面无扩缩招带来的供需变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第198名（2025年），近年排名有所下滑，2026年未进入前20 0名。学校位于青海省西宁市，距上海较远，地域因素对上海考生报考意愿有一定抑制；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显著正面或负面事件记录，整体声誉平稳；抖 音热度排名第106位（末位），评价为"一般"，综合热度较低，短视频平台曝光度不高，未形成明显的报考关注热点；青海大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上 等级学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生的专业吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在上海市招生的主要专业包括临床医学、口腔医学、计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其 自动化等，其中医学类专业社会热度较高，但该校医学学科评估等级不高；上海市2026年普通高考考生约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，考生规模大幅增长将加剧整体 竞争；2026年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的高基数、2026年招生计划持平、上海市考生规模显著扩大（+35.4%）以及学校声誉平稳 、抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，位次在2025年27375名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约27405名，区间26905–27905名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 22835 → 23018 → 23581 → 21226 → 27375, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, it briefly moved forward to 21226, but in 2025, it significantly moved backward by 6149 places to 27375, the lowest level in the past five years, indicating a clear cooling of application enthusiasm; the university's enrollment plan for Shanghai comprehensive category from 2021 to 2025 and 2026 is consistently 6 students, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no supply-demand changes due to expansion or contraction at the plan level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 198th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2025), with a declining ranking in recent years, and not entering the top 200 in 2026. The university is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Shanghai, and geographical factors have a certain inhibitory effect on Shanghai candidates' willingness to apply; there are no significant positive or negative event records in the reputation and public opinion files, with overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 106th (last), rated as 'average', with relatively low overall popularity, low exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious application attention hotspot; Qinghai University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, and limited professional appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The main majors recruited by the university in Shanghai include Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., among which medical majors have high social popularity, but the university's medical discipline evaluation level is not high; the number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, and the significant growth in candidate scale will intensify overall competition; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high base of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant expansion of Shanghai candidate scale (+35.4%), and factors such as stable university reputation and average Douyin popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026, with rankings moving slightly backward based on the 2025 ranking of 27375. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27405, with a range of 26905–27905.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 26905–27905 are advised to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Digital Economy) as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 26905) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.
